channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Minor league baseball team reverses Gold Diggers name change after outrage
item.description: The Sacramento River Cats were set to play as the Sacramento Gold Diggers for a few games but backlash over a promotional video forced a name change.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Champions League: PSG and Barcelona protect leads heading into 2nd legs of quarterfinals
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain looks in better shape than ever to win the Champions League after shedding its “galacticos” and can reach the semifinals by completing the job against Aston Villa.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ivan Demidov scores in NHL debut with Montreal Canadiens
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — Ivan Demidov made quite the first impression in his anticipated NHL debut on Monday night. The 19-year-old Russian forward had a goal and an assist in the first period of Montreal's 4-3 shootout loss against Chicago. The Canadiens wasted an opportunity to clinch a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Paul Skenes and Henry Davis, taken 1st overall two years apart, make MLB history
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — From the moment they heard their names called out by Major League Baseball commissioner Rob Manfred, Paul Skenes and Henry Davis were destined to make history.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sky reunite Hailey Van Lith with Angel Reese in WNBA Draft
item.description: Hailey Van Lith and Angel Reese are teammates once more, as the Chicago Sky took the former LSU Tigers guard 11th overall in the 2025 WNBA Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA assembles task force to help combat online hate toward players and teams
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert announced shortly before the draft Monday that the league has assembled a dedicated task force to help combat online hate and vitriol directed toward players and teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Judge salutes 'brave men and women' fighting for country after being named Team USA captain for WBC
item.description: Aaron Judge was named Team USA's captain for the 2026 World Baseball Classic, and during his press conference, he saluted the "brave men and women who have fought for our country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington rips CBS for call on Rory McIlroy's potential disaster putt
item.description: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington was highly critical of Jim Nantz's call during Rory McIlroy's 18th hole putt that forced a playoff at The Masters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South Carolina guard MiLaysia Fulwiley enters transfer portal, AP source says
item.description: South Carolina guard MiLaysia Fulwiley is officially in the transfer portal, according to a person with access to it. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Monday on condition of anonymity because no official announcement has been made.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears sign Kyler Gordon to record extension, make him highest-paid slot corner in NFL
item.description: The Chicago Bears have agreed to a three-year, $40 million contract extension with corner Kyler Gordon, making him one of the highest-paid corners in the NFL and keeping him in Chicago for at least the next four seasons.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Garrett Crochet dazzles in return to South Side, takes no-no into the 8th in Red Sox victory
item.description: Garrett Crochet returned to the South Side with a vengeance, throwing seven and one-third innings and striking out eleven, but the Red Sox won the game 3-1 to avoid a sweep.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks host the Jets following Foligno's 2-goal game
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (54-21-4, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (23-46-10, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks host the Winnipeg Jets after Nick Foligno's two-goal game against the Boston Bruins in the Blackhawks' 5-2 win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah falls in shootout in home finale, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the final game at the Delta Center in their inaugural season, the Utah Hockey Club lost a thriller in a shootout to the Nashville Predators Thursday night, 4-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
